docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 2/13/26 CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO AVIANCA AIRLINES (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY BATRA, JITENDRA
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER PLAINTIFFS REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2026 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH. PLAINTIFF JITENDRA BATRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AVIANCA AIRLINES IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT CORRECTS THE NAME OF THE DEFENDANT TO AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANVA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATRA, JITENDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANCA $2,182.88 PRINCIPAL, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,422.88, REPLACEMENT TICKETS, TRANSPORTATION, HOTEL, AND BREAKFAST WERE REASONABLY RELATED TO DEFENDANT'S ACTIONS. DEFENDANT NAME CORRECTED NUNC PRO TUNC TO REFLECT PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-20-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. **CASES CSM-25-870813, CSM-25-870 & CSM-25-870816 ARE TO BE HEARD TOGETHER.** PLAINTIFF JITENDRA BATRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AVIANCA AIRLINES IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
